title: phanera ornata var. balansae
intro: Phanera ornata var. balansae, also known as Phanera balansae, is a species of climbing plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phanera ornata var. balansae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
